heading.zh: 性质词描述——用 more/most 比较

body.en: Adjectives describe things (good, long, red). Compare with more and most: more beautiful, the most beautiful. Many opposites come in pairs (good/bad, old/young) or with a prefix.
body.zh: 形容词描述事物（good, long, red）。用 more 和 most 比较：more beautiful, the most beautiful。许多反义词成对出现（good/bad, old/young）或加前缀。

words.example: We live in the same house.
She came second in the race.
They sleep in separate rooms.
He has a serious illness.

gloss.en: with a fine edge that can cut

words.example: Be careful with the sharp knife.
The metal has a smooth surface.
Her fingers were sticky with jam.
This card is thick and stiff.
We drove down a long straight road.
He is strong enough to lift it.
His death was very sudden.
I like a cup of sweet tea.
She is tall and thin.

gloss.en: wide between two sides; not thin

words.example: He cut a thick slice of bread.
He held her arm with a tight grip.

gloss.en: feeling you want to sleep or rest

words.example: I feel very tired tonight.
Is this story true or false?

gloss.en: using force to hurt or kill

words.example: They stopped the violent crime.
A waiting car was at the door.

gloss.en: a little hot in a pleasant way

words.example: We had warm weather all week.
My clothes are wet from the rain.

gloss.en: large from one side to the other

words.example: It is a wide, fast river.

gloss.en: able to make good, sensible choices

words.example: He is a wise old man.

gloss.en: the colour of lemons or butter

words.example: She picked some yellow flowers.

gloss.en: having lived only a short time

words.example: Young babies need warm clothes.
The baby is still awake.
I have some bad news for you.
He held a piece of bent wire.

gloss.en: having a strong, not sweet taste

words.example: Black coffee has a bitter taste.

gloss.en: the colour of a clear sky

words.example: She has bright blue eyes.
I think it was him, but I am not certain.
I am cold; turn the heat up.
This is a complete list of names.
He was a cruel man.
The room was cold and dark.
The old tree is now dead.

gloss.en: loved; used to start a letter

words.example: The letter began with Dear Sir.
These delicate cups break easily.
My answer is different from yours.
Wash your dirty hands.
Is my shirt dry yet?
Is this answer true or false?
The sick man felt weak and feeble.
She is a female student.
It was a foolish thing to do.
We must save it for future days.

gloss.en: the colour of grass and leaves

words.example: The grass is bright green.
Her father is very ill.

gloss.en: after all others; at the end

words.example: He came last in the race.
I am sorry I am late.

gloss.en: on the side opposite the right

words.example: He writes with his left hand.
The child has a loose tooth.
We heard loud laughter next door.
He sat on a low wall.
They eat a mixed diet.

gloss.en: small from side to side; not wide

words.example: We walked down a narrow street.

gloss.en: having lived a long time; of an age

words.example: The baby was only a few hours old.
The answers are on the opposite page.

gloss.en: for or about all the people

words.example: This is a public park for everyone.
The road has a rough surface.
We are sad to hear you are leaving.
The children are quite safe here.

gloss.en: hidden; known by only a few

words.example: They held a secret meeting.
He had short curly hair.
The door was shut.
We found a simple answer.

gloss.en: not fast; taking a long time

words.example: We walked at a slow pace.

gloss.en: not big in size or amount

words.example: They live in a small town.
The bed is warm and soft.
Ice is water in a solid form.

gloss.en: not usual; different in a good way

words.example: Today is a special day for us.
A strange thing happened today.

gloss.en: small between two sides; not thick

words.example: Cut the bread into thin slices.

gloss.en: the colour of fresh snow or milk

words.example: He wore a clean white shirt.
I got all the answers wrong.
